/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/__/src/ConfigLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/__/src/HighScore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/__/src/Bird.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/__/src/Pipe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/__/src/ResourceManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/__/src/StateFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/__/src/PlayState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/__/src/GameOverState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/test_Bird.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/test_Collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/test_ConfigLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/test_HighScore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/test_Integration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/test_ObjectPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/test_Pipe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/test_ResourceManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/test_ScoreFloat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flappy_tests.dir/test_StateFactory.cpp.o -o flappy_tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system -lsfml-audio /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
